brief: Grow brix.math into a real elementary numeric utilities module using typed overloads (same name for Int and Float). Exact `fn name(args) -> T = expr` syntax. Required: overloaded abs/min/max/clamp/neg/add/sub/mul/isNonNeg/isPos/between for Int and Float, plus Int-only sign. Flagship-shaped `clamp` on Float. Do not use absF/clampInt suffixes. No Decimal/units/`%`. Preserve existing decls; host formats after check.
